parameters.content:
## Synthesis Report Builder

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set SYNTHESIS_EMAIL_TO
3. Feed research inputs (interview findings, survey data, usability results)
4. LLM synthesises cross-study insights into a structured research report
5. Approval gate before report is distributed

parameters.jsCode:
const { report: r, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const report = [
  `RESEARCH SYNTHESIS REPORT`,
  `${m.title}`,
  `Period: ${m.period} | Studies synthesised: ${m.study_count} | Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  `EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:`,
  r.executive_summary,
  ``,
  `CROSS-STUDY PATTERNS:`,
  (r.cross_study_patterns||[]).map(p=>`  [${p.confidence.toUpperCase()} confidence] ${p.pattern}\n  Studies: ${p.supporting_studies.join(', ')}\n  Implication: ${p.strategic_implication}`).join('\n\n'),
  ``,
  `RECONCILED FINDINGS:`,
  (r.reconciled_findings||[]).map(rf=>`  Topic: ${rf.topic}\n  Studies say: ${rf.what_different_studies_say}\n  Synthesis: ${rf.synthesis}`).join('\n\n'),
  ``,
  `PRIORITISED RECOMMENDATIONS:`,
  (r.prioritised_recommendations||[]).map(rec=>`  [${rec.priority.toUpperCase()} priority | ${rec.effort} effort | ${rec.evidence_strength} evidence] ${rec.recommendation}\n  Rationale: ${rec.rationale}`).join('\n\n'),
  ``,
  `OPEN QUESTIONS:`,
  (r.open_questions||[]).map((q,i)=>`  ${i+1}. ${q}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `NEXT STUDIES SUGGESTED:`,
  (r.next_studies_suggested||[]).map(s=>`  - ${s.study}\n    Why: ${s.why}`).join('\n'),
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];
